name: Find accommodation partners on Booking.com with Apify and GoogleSheet

parameters.content:
## Find accommodation partners on Booking.com with Apify and Google Sheets

### How it works

1. Manually trigger the workflow to initialize configurations for data processing.
2. Retrieve and process data from Booking using Apify.
3. Integrate data from Google Maps and refine through multiple merging tiers.
4. Further refine data from Google Search and Contact Details Scraper to complete missing fields.
5. Perform final merging and store processed data in Google Sheets.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Configure Apify credentials for running Actors
- [ ] Set up Google Sheets API with access to the target sheet
- [ ] Define necessary configurations such as 'destination', 'maxItems', and 'propertyType' in the Config node

### Customization

Adjust the 'maxItems' and 'propertyType' in the **Set Destination and Parameters** node for different data processing requirements.
If you want to run the workflow on a schedule you can replace the **Manual Trigger** with a **Schedule Trigger**.

### Who it's for
This template can help you find and contact hospitality providers. It is relevant for:
- BD teams at OTAs
- Travel platforms
- Tour operators
- Travel agencies

### Apify Actors used:
- [Booking Scraper](https://apify.com/voyager/booking-scraper) - properties by destination and type
- [Google Maps Email Extractor](https://apify.com/lukaskrivka/google-maps-with-contact-details) - email, phone, and socials ⚠️ verify Actor name
- [Google Search Results Scraper](https://apify.com/apify/google-search-scraper) - finds the property website
- [Contact Details Scraper](https://apify.com/vdrmota/contact-info-scraper) - pulls contacts from that website

## Trigger and configuration setup

Initialize the workflow with manual trigger and set initial configurations.

## Booking data retrieval

Use Apify to run actors and retrieve Booking data.

## Initial data processing

Process Booking data into lead rows and begin Google Maps data integration.

## Merge and search refinement

Refine data through multiple merging tiers using Google Maps and Search.

## Final data processing and storage

Finalize merging with contact details and store in Google Sheets.

parameters.customBody:
={
  "search": "{{ $('Set Destination and Parameters').first().json.destination }}",
  "maxItems": {{ $('Set Destination and Parameters').first().json.maxItems }},
  "propertyType": "{{ $('Set Destination and Parameters').first().json.propertyType }}",
  "sortBy": "distance_from_search",
  "currency": "USD",
  "language": "en-us",
  "checkIn": "2026-08-21",
  "checkOut": "2026-08-31",
  "rooms": 1,
  "adults": 2
}

={{ { "searchStringsArray": $('Map Booking to Lead Rows').all().filter(i => !i.json.email).map(i => i.json.name + ', ' + i.json._dest), "locationQuery": $('Set Destination and Parameters').first().json.destination, "maxCrawledPlacesPerSearch": 1, "language": "en", "countryCode": "us" } }}

={{ { "queries": $('Merge Maps Data').all().filter(i => !i.json.email && !i.json.website).map(i => i.json.name + ' ' + (i.json.city || i.json._dest) + ' official website').join(String.fromCharCode(10)), "maxPagesPerQuery": 1, "resultsPerPage": 5, "countryCode": "us", "languageCode": "en" } }}

={{ { "startUrls": $('Assign Candidate Websites').all().filter(i => !i.json.email && i.json.website).map(i => ({ url: i.json.website })), "maxDepth": 2, "maxRequestsPerStartUrl": 20, "mergeContacts": true, "sameDomain": true, "considerChildFrames": true, "useBrowser": false, "proxyConfig": { "useApifyProxy": true } } }}
